recoverIsWrapf.syntax: ok=0
recoverIsWrapf.custom1: err=parsing "custom1": custom-1
recoverAsErr.syntax: ok=-1
recoverAsErr.custom1: err=custom-2
multiRecover.custom1: ok=100
multiRecover.custom2: ok=200
multiRecover.syntax: err=multi: strconv.Atoi: parsing "abc": invalid syntax
mixedIsAs.custom1: ok=11
mixedIsAs.syntax: ok=22
mixedIsAs.custom2: err=custom-2
recoverIsCatch.custom1: ok=33
recoverIsCatch.custom2: err=caught: custom-2
happyPath: ok=7
recoverIsWrapf.custom1.is: true
